zh.lifeSummary: Annabelle Kilpatrick於大約1150年出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓。她於1180年與Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾拉斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1220年在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年71歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Annabelle Kilpatrick于大约1150年出生在苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓。她于1180年与Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun在苏格兰登巴頓史爾拉斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1220年在英国苏格兰韋斯特 登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年71岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Kilpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

variants.name: Kirkpatrick
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Fitzpatrick
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Declan, Ronan, Liam, Seamus, Sinead, Siobhan, Aileen, Bridie, Brigid, Conan.

Irish: occasionally this may be a genuine Anglo-Norman French patronymic meaning ‘son of Patrick ’, but more often it has been adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Pádraig, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Patrick’ (see Kilpatrick ).

variants.name: Gilpatrick
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (see Kilpatrick ).

nameMeanings.name: Annabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabell
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabella
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: Annabelle Kilpatrick was born about 1150, in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. She married Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun in 1180, in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1220, in Dumbarton, West Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: Luss, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Annabelle Kilpatrick est née environ 1150, à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse. Elle a épousé Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun en 1180, à Luss, Dunbartonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1220, à Dumbarton, West Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Annabelle Kilpatrick wurde um 1150 in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland geboren. Sie hat 1180 in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1220 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Dumbarton, West Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Annabelle Kilpatrick è nata il circa 1150 nel Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Lei sposato Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun nel 1180, nel Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1220, nel Dumbarton, West Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Annabelle Kilpatrickは約1150年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンで生まれた。1180年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアルスでGilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1220年にイギリススコットランドウエスト ダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンで71歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 루스
ko.lifeSummary: Annabelle Kilpatrick(은)는 대략 1150년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1180년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 루스에서 Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 던바토실르 드바턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun em 1180, em Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: лусс, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Annabelle Kilpatrick родилась около 1150 г. в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun в 1180 г. в местности лусс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1220 г. в местности думбартон, вест дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
